HomePage.badge: ✦ Cited. Curriculum-only. Built for ESL classrooms.
HomePage.headline: One truth: <material>your teacher's material</material>, in <language>every student's language</language>.
HomePage.subtitle: <brand>Verity AI</brand> answers only from your school's approved material — never the open internet, cited every time — and speaks in a student's own language, starting with <highlight>Chinese (Mandarin, Simplified)</highlight>.

student.label: Student
student.desc: Learn with a curriculum-locked AI guide

teacher.label: Teacher
teacher.desc: Monitor AI use, track progress & misconceptions

closedCorpus.title: Closed-corpus AI
closedCorpus.body: Answers only from teacher-approved materials — with an exact citation every time.

translation.title: Top-end translation
translation.body: Simplified English + Chinese (中文), tuned with a physics glossary for accuracy.

interactive.title: Interactive science
interactive.body: Drag-and-feel simulations turn abstract physics into something you can play with.

guides.title: Guides, never cheats
guides.body: The AI hints and asks questions — it won't do the assignment for you.

adaptive.title: Adaptive & transparent
adaptive.body: Adapts difficulty to each learner; every AI chat is visible to teachers.

grading.title: Trusted grading
grading.body: Numbers graded deterministically — never by a guessing chatbot.

HomePage.footer: Built for the Claude Code Hackathon · Grade 7 Physics demo corpus · © Verity AI
